title: How do I Change My Two-Step Verification Code? | USCIS
content:
## How do I Change My Two-Step Verification Code?
When you create your online account, you will choose how you want to receive the verification code. You can choose email, text message, authentication app, or a combination of both email and text message. Later, you can change how you receive this one-time code.
Log in to your USCIS online account at myaccount.uscis.gov Once logged in, click on the My Account menu . Select Settings from the dropdown menu.
- Log in to your USCIS online account at myaccount.uscis.gov
- Once logged in, click on the My Account menu .
- Select Settings from the dropdown menu.
On the Account Settings page, click the View all settings link.
- On the Account Settings page, click the View all settings link.
On the Edit Account page, click the Edit button in the Two-Step Verification row.
- On the Edit Account page, click the Edit button in the Two-Step Verification row.
On the Edit Two-Step Verification Methods page, you can add another verification method by clicking Add next to: Authentication App SMS Text Message Email When you’re finished, click Done editing to save your changes.
- On the Edit Two-Step Verification Methods page, you can add another verification method by clicking Add next to: Authentication App SMS Text Message Email
- When you’re finished, click Done editing to save your changes.
